name: Chinese: Spicy Cold Noodles with Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Noodles: In a large pot of salted boiling water, cook the noodles until chewy; rinse in cold water; drain. Toss with 1/2 tablespoon oil to prevent sticking. Cover and refrigerate until ready to use.
2. Chicken: Remove and discard skin from chicken breast. Steam breast for 15 minutes; remove from steamer and cool uncovered. Shred chicken with fingers; slice into 3-inch strips.
3. Egg Yolks: Mix yolks with cool water. Brush a skillet at medium heat with peanut oil. Pour some egg yolk mixture in the skillet; spread to make a thin sheet; remove when egg is set. Repeat until all egg is used. Cool egg sheets and slice into thin strips to match chicken shreds.
4. Onions: Wash and remove roots. Slice the long way, then thinly slice on the bias.
5. Dressing: Mix soy sauce, vinegar, chili oil, ginger juice, garlic, and sugar in a small bowl. Heat oil until it begins to smoke; add to other ingredients. Cool. Using hot oil gives dressing its distinctive and mellow flavor.
6. Mixing: Just before serving, mix dressing with cold noodles, chicken, and onion. Garnish with egg strips. Serve.
